message:
Fix native function visibility in WASM bytecode execution

Root cause: Zig function pointers don't work correctly with QuickJS
JS_NewCFunction when compiled to WASM. The function table indices
don't translate properly.

Solution: Implement native bindings in C (src/native_bindings.c)
which gets compiled alongside QuickJS. The C function pointers
work correctly with JS_NewCFunction.

Changes:
- Add src/native_bindings.c with C implementations of fs functions
- Use register_native_bindings() called from Zig instead of direct
  Zig function registration
- Add native_bindings.c to wasm-static build in build.zig
- Update polyfill debug output

Native functions now visible:
[POLYFILL] __edgebox_test42=function
[POLYFILL] __edgebox_fs_exists=function
[POLYFILL] __edgebox_test42()=42

Status: --version works, -p hello hangs (needs timer/async investigation)
